name: Class: CanDisturbanceBitSequence
title: Class: CanDisturbanceBitSequence
description: Each object of CanDisturbanceBitSequence represents one bit within a CanDisturbanceFrameSequenceField.
You can access control information of a CanDisturbanceBitSequence object with the following attributes:
tables: The number of segments for the bit.
The value of each segment Possible values: d: dominant level r: recessive level R: recessive stress level
The length of each segment in FPGA ticks.
